wio_ir_send_nec.message0: send Wio IR NEC data %1 carrier %2 kHz
wio_ir_send_nec.tooltip: Send an NEC code through the built-in infrared emitter; the default example is TV power code 0x61A0F00F at 38 kHz

wio_ir_send.message0: send Wio IR protocol %1 data %2 extra/bits %3 carrier %4 kHz
wio_ir_send.tooltip: Send the selected IRLib2 protocol through the built-in emitter; the extra value is protocol-specific and may represent bits, an address, or a first-send flag

wio_ir_send_raw.message0: send Wio IR Raw timings %1 carrier %2 kHz
wio_ir_send_raw.tooltip: Send comma-separated Raw infrared timings in microseconds, such as 9000,4500,560,560; use at most 255 values, each from 1 to 65535
